evals.expected_output: Should ask which backend (GPT-image-2 or Dreamina), scan media/0516/ for .md files, read each article's full content per section, summarize content, distill visual prompts from content (not headings), and call the chosen backend

assertions.text: Asks user which backend to use (GPT-image-2 API or Dreamina CLI)
assertions.name: asks_backend

assertions.text: Each prompt includes the Excalidraw style prefix
assertions.name: uses_excalidraw_prefix

assertions.text: Visual prompts are based on section content, not just section headings
assertions.name: content_based_prompts

assertions.text: Reports content summary alongside visual prompt for each section
assertions.name: reports_content_summary

assertions.text: Output images are saved to media/0516/ directory
assertions.name: saves_to_article_dir

evals.prompt: 帮我用即梦生成今天头条的插图
evals.expected_output: Should use Dreamina CLI (user specified 即梦), identify today's date, find the 头条-*.md file, read and summarize each section's content, distill visual prompts from content, and call dreamina text2image

assertions.text: Uses Dreamina CLI (dreamina text2image) as backend
assertions.name: uses_dreamina

assertions.text: Processes only the 头条 article
assertions.name: processes_only_toutiao

assertions.text: Each prompt includes the Excalidraw style prefix
assertions.name: uses_excalidraw_prefix

assertions.text: Visual prompts are based on section content, not just section headings
assertions.name: content_based_prompts

assertions.text: Correctly infers '今天' maps to date directory
assertions.name: infers_date_correctly

evals.prompt: 用GPT-image-2给media/0516的文章生成封面图
evals.expected_output: Should use GPT-image-2 API (user specified), scan media/0516/ for articles, summarize content for cover sections only, and call API with async mode

assertions.text: Uses GPT-image-2 API with async replyType
assertions.name: uses_gpt_image_2

assertions.text: Each prompt includes the Excalidraw style prefix
assertions.name: uses_excalidraw_prefix

assertions.text: Only generates cover images (title/封面) since user asked for 封面图
assertions.name: cover_only
